name: Improper Handling of Apple HFS+ Alternate Data Stream Path
description: The product does not properly handle special file path syntax that accesses data forks or resource forks on Apple HFS+ filesystems, potentially allowing attackers to bypass access controls or access hidden file content.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename containing HFS+ fork syntax ('/..namedfork/data' or '/..namedfork/rsrc') that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects or sanitizes fork path components
